'''Wingstingers''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of small [[Insect/Legends|insects]] found on [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]]. They were considered pesky by the [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit/Legends|Rimsoo]] personnel there, who used osmotic fields to keep them out of their operating theaters. Wingstingers possessed eight legs and were bi-winged.<ref name="MBS" />

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]''
*''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]''
*''[[Jedi's Honor]]'' {{Mo}}
